title: Divide Array Into Equal Pairs
titleCn: 将数组划分成相等数对

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,3,2,2,2] Output: true Explanation: There are 6 elements in nums, so they should be divided into 6 / 2 = 3 pairs. If nums is divided into the pairs (2, 2), (3, 3), and (2, 2), it will satisfy all the conditions.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: There are 6 elements in nums, so they should be divided into 6 / 2 = 3 pairs. If nums is divided into the pairs (2, 2), (3, 3), and (2, 2), it will satisfy all the conditions.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4] Output: false Explanation: There is no way to divide nums into 4 / 2 = 2 pairs such that the pairs satisfy every condition.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There is no way to divide nums into 4 / 2 = 2 pairs such that the pairs satisfy every condition.
